Name: kb_entry_departments
SQL: SELECT coalesce(json_agg("_root"), '[]') AS "_root" FROM (WITH "_root.base" AS (SELECT * FROM "public"."kb_entry_departments" ORDER BY (SELECT (SELECT "_cs_ob1"."display_name" FROM "auth"."users" "_cs_ob1" WHERE "_cs_ob0"."uploader_id" = "_cs_ob1"."id" LIMIT 1) FROM "public"."kb_entries" "_cs_ob0" WHERE "public"."kb_entry_departments"."kb_entry_id" = "_cs_ob0"."id" LIMIT 1) ASC LIMIT 10) SELECT row_to_json((SELECT "_e" FROM (SELECT "_root.base"."id" AS "id") AS "_e")) AS "_root" FROM "_root.base") AS "_root"
